title: COPY INTO from .. LOCKED doubles input data
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(v1 INTEGER, v2 TEXT, v3 DATE DEFAULT (CURRENT_DATE));
INSERT INTO t1(v1, v2) VALUES (1, 'test1'), (2, 'test2'), (3, NULL);
INSERT INTO t1(v1, v2) SELECT v1 + 1, v2 FROM t1 WHERE v3 IS NOT NULL;
